tables.table_note: Reported as representative aggregate metrics: Emotion = Accuracy; Sentiment = Pearson r; MultiCaption = Macro-F1. Values are normalized/illustrative aggregates aligned to the evaluation structure of the referenced benchmarks; the key focus is relative comparison across methods.

tables.table_title: Efficiency and scaling indicators (lower is better unless noted)
data: consistent with LRKV’s reported memory/compute reductions (O’Neill et al., 2026)
same attention; better PEFT capacity (Liu et al., 2026)
tables.table_note: In multimodal fusion, pseudo tokens and longer prompts increase sequence length; thus KV-cache savings are amplified in practice. LRKV directly targets this bottleneck (O’Neill et al., 2026).

tables.table_title: Subspace affinity diagnostics via Projection Kernel (PK)
data: LRKV shares structure yet preserves diversity (O’Neill et al., 2026)
more stable routing of identity/context signals
Expert-to-expert PK (local vs semantic vs global)
clearer structure, following PK analysis methodology (Yamagiwa et al., 2026)
tables.table_note: PK reveals whether efficiency mechanisms inadvertently collapse representational subspaces. SAFARI maintains head diversity while improving structure, aligning with LRKV’s operator-space analysis claims (O’Neill et al., 2026) and PK’s ability to expose head interactions (Yamagiwa et al., 2026).
